productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Black All Access Fullfare Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this trendy nike backpacks with your sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A black and grey camouflage backpack with yellow highlights and a black and white brand applique in the front Two curved padded shoulder straps with one short handle on top and padded back One main compartment with an internal mesh zippered compartment One easily accessible zippered pocket in front with two internal open mesh pockets Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 74% nylon and 24% polyester lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 44 cm Width: 31 cm Depth: 10 cm
